calendar.matters:
Petition For Construction Of The Terms Of A Trust And For Instructions To The Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Symons for Wells Fargo Bank (Trustee).

Ms. Symons stated that the she does not have information as to how much is in the trust, and explained who takes from the Trusts in the event Deborah passes, that the language "Lena's Heirs at law" was a scrivener's error and the difficulty in having to do separate accountings for the sub trusts. The Petition for Construction of the Terms of a Trust, etc. was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Malone. (Not Reported)

Petition For Construction Of The Terms Of A Trust And For Instructions To The Trustee
